generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts national security at risk. The recent cyber attacks on our infrastructure prove we can't afford to wait. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-reliant - it's about fulfilling our duty to protect our nation. Every day we delay is another day our enemies have the upper hand. #NationalSecurityFirst #DutyBeforeProfit
